title: Time-based automations
excerpt: When creating time-based automations, we’d like to be able to use relative dates. For example, every week on a Friday create a task with a due date of 3 days after the task creation date.

posts.author: kamila (Kamila Hughes)
posts.cookedHtml: When creating time-based automations, we’d like to be able to use relative dates. For example, every week on a Friday create a task with a due date of 3 days after the task creation date.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @kamila
I came across your post. There is actually an app that does that. It is called Set Relative Timeline and can be used with any custom automation. In can be found here in the marketplace.
